title: GrowthX x Surge - Marketing Alignment Sync

Is that helpful to you?
Do you want to know that information more thoroughly?

So this is for next February and not the November event.
that right?

So much smaller in the February.
We're looking at a much larger, like hopefully getting a keynote or some kind of talking space, especially if it's about data.
And then there's one more like coming up that's in December.

I think that is, they're just going to throw a little bit of money at and probably not even send anyone from Surge to that one because it's much more like junior engineer focused, which the name escapes me.
But yeah.
Cool.
Thank you.
Yes.
Great.
Yeah.
So I think that's about it for amplification as far as we've moved along that line and then proofs.
So content, as far as I can tell, is like pretty stalled.
And so we're pitching different bets to them right now.

It's very difficult to, I don't know how much you guys have also run into this, but it's very difficult to figure out like where they want to move in terms of content just because there's like data annotation.
So we're starting to work with them as well and we're doing like our typical content pipeline, you know, sprint strategy.
amazing.
to be with, it's you're
It's much easier with them, but with Surge specifically, it's much more complicated because of kind of the Edwin thought leadership side of things.
And so we have not really moved forward on any of that, but we pitched some more mock-ups today, and they would take a look at them and get back to us.
But you probably know that's mostly in-house.
I think it's mostly Mason doing all of Edwin's LinkedIn posts and things like that.
So we don't really own that at all.
We would love to own it, but we don't.
Yeah.
Yeah.
okay.
Yeah.
I'm sorry.
Go ahead.
No, please.
All you, Chelsea.

Well, I think that has been something that the team has articulated that, you know, they've gone through different cycles, and Mason being the internal point person for Edwin's voice seems like the model that is working best to actually get content out the door.
We do plan to support that work stream because it is so tightly tied to.
The reporter conversations that we're having.
I guess one question I have is, are you building out awareness campaigns and content for the data annotation tech brand itself?
Or is that just surge content that is tied to data annotation tech?
So data annotation kicked off like last week.
So we're barely starting with that.
but it's really about sourcing hires.
So I guess sergers and finding the, yeah, that's really all it is to reach, which is something like not that difficult for us.
And also we can use our other clients to help.
is it, sorry to be blunt, is the, is how you're measured the number of hires sourced or is it more brand awareness?
Yeah.
To figure out the measurements of success in general on the account.
Yeah, so it's definitely not brand awareness, though, I'd say.
I'd say they're specifically looking to hire, to increase the number of experienced coders they're bringing in every single month.
That's like the first ask at this moment in time, not data annotation brand awareness.
Yeah, because it's very different, like, the way they put themselves forward than compared to Mercor.
And so it's like, it doesn't seem like that's really an interest at this moment in time.
It's much more about getting the right hires, to my understanding.
But we start that kind of investigation and sprint strategy now, this week, and then we move in and better understand their needs over the next few weeks.
Got it.
Well, we can certainly keep you apprised of, you know, where we're at.
But we are still, I mean, I think the messaging itself continues to evolve.
As the market does.
So we can keep you apprised there.
I will tell you, I think Surge is pulling us more into that part of the content work stream.
But we do not touch data annotation tech in any way.

So in terms of bright lines, it feels like that's a very easy one for you all to be focused on versus us focusing more on, again, our bread and butter is going to be brand versus demand gen or hiring.
So I do think there's likely some overlap in our events approach.
We, again, are much more focused on earned.
So we're not touching paid, obviously, in our interactions.
With organizers, they will remind us that one can pay for things, but we don't really touch that side of the house.
So I suspect our targets and conversations may be slightly redundant, but what we typically do with clients is we approach earned first and failing that.
That's when we go in on the paid side of things.
So I might recommend that we stay in close touch on conversations and actually like share, you know, just have better visibility across the events we're prioritizing.
Yeah, I can loop Gloria in too as well, because that's a very different approach than to my knowledge we've taken so far.
So it would be helpful to kind of flesh out what the actual priority is there.
Makes sense.
Yeah, I'll add her to the channel, and then we can see about if we need another call.
Great.
So then, okay, brand.

So with content, right, we don't really have anything going on currently with Surge, but from your perspective and what you know of the development positioning, the angle that you have right now in the brand's development, do you feel like there's any need for content or somewhere that would fit in and under what y'all are doing?
Or is that something that you also produce in any way?
We do produce that, so I don't actually anticipate that there would be a need there.
Okay.
Okay.
And then that's about it, then I think I have, like, besides that, just messaging and positioning, but it sounds like y'all have that down.
I think if there is a way for you to share some kind of context around brand identity, that might help us, just if you feel like you're further along in that development.
is kind of around I around I think Thank you.
Certainly than we are, that would inform also some of our approaches to like events and even just creating like signage for those and whatever swag even can inform that.
Absolutely.
Happy to.
Well, it's so nice to make the connection and talk a little bit more about this very special client.
Yeah.
I mean, it is exciting.
I do think that y'all have a very interesting role in translating Edwin's brain, which is like kind of fun and challenging, but really kind of worth it.
think post-training is so, so important right now.
And I think it'll become a bigger conversation moving forward.
So totally agree.
Yeah.
Any other thoughts, anything else we could support with or anything you kind of see as something glaring, like we would need to talk about or not duplicate?
I don't think so.
But now that we're better acquainted, I think the lines of communication are open.
And we will certainly keep you all in mind and share things as relevant.
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
And I'll meet up with Gloria and Jason, let them know, and then we'll kind of go from there.
But thank you so much for your time.
And then we'll just communicate async.
Sounds great.
All right.
So nice meeting.
Talk later.
Nice meeting you.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align marketing efforts and clarify roles between GrowthX and Surge's PR agency (cmand.co) for Surge AI.](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [cmand.co handles earned comms (PR, media relations, brand awareness) for Surge; GrowthX focuses on events, content production, and amplification](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Potential overlap in events strategy; need to coordinate efforts and prioritize earned vs. paid opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Content production for Surge is mostly in-house; GrowthX exploring new content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Data annotation tech brand focus: GrowthX supporting hiring efforts, not brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Liz (GrowthX): New account strategist for complex accounts, including Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Tania, Riley, Chelsea (cmand.co): PR agency team for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in content production and amplification (events)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [cmand.co focuses on earned communications, media relations, and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### GrowthX's Current Work Streams

  - [Events:](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [VIP experiences, nurturing dinners in SF and NY](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Seeking co-hosting opportunities with large names](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Conference participation (e.g., AI Engineer keynote, data summit)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Sponsorships: Lanyards, coffee carts ($5k spend for smaller events)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Content:](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Currently stalled for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Pitching new ideas and mock-ups](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Data annotation tech focus: Sourcing experienced coders (hiring-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Amplification:](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Podcast recommendations (no direct involvement)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Challenges with positioning Surge's niche AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### cmand.co's PR and Communications Work

  - [Earned media strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Building relationships with media outlets](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Driving brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Securing speaking opportunities for Edwin and other leaders](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Reactive PR work](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Advising on messaging for owned channels](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Strategy and Ownership

  - [Surge's content mostly in-house (Mason handling Edwin's LinkedIn posts)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [cmand.co aiming to support content tied to media relations](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring new content strategies, awaiting feedback on pitches](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### Events and Speaking Opportunities

  - [cmand.co focuses on earned speaking spots](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [GrowthX handles paid sponsorships and VIP experiences](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Need for better coordination to avoid redundancy](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Suggestion: Approach earned opportunities first, then consider paid options](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### Data Annotation Tech Brand

  - [GrowthX starting work on this sub-brand (kicked off last week)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Focus on sourcing experienced coders, not brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [cmand.co not involved with data annotation tech brand](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Brand Identity and Messaging

  - [cmand.co has more developed brand identity for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Offer to share context to inform GrowthX's approach to events, signage, and swag](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Liz to loop in Gloria (GrowthX events lead) for alignment on events strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [cmand.co to share brand identity context with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Maintain open communication between teams to avoid duplication of efforts](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Liz to meet with Gloria and Jason to discuss outcomes and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Continue async communication for ongoing alignment](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

action_items.description: Add Gloria to comms channel re Surge events strategy; coordinate potential follow-up call
Share Surge brand identity context/docs w/ GrowthX team for event planning
Meet w/ Gloria & Jason to update on convo w/ Command team re Surge account
